formulaLegend.base: Ayah/Hadith/History + Meaning/Source/Context -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: I am the opening of the Quran, recited in every raka'ah. My name means 'The Opening'.
cards.answer: Surah Al-Fatiha — Surah 1, 7 verses
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 'All praise is due to Allah, Lord of...' — second verse of Al-Fatiha.
cards.answer: ...the worlds (al-'alameen) — 1:2
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 'And your Lord said: Call upon Me, I will...' — complete from Surah Ghafir.
cards.answer: ...respond to you — Ghafir 40:60
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: I am named after a spider whose web protected the Prophet (pbuh) and Abu Bakr in a cave during the Hijra. I also tell the story of trials of faith.
cards.answer: Surah Al-Ankabut / The Spider — Surah 29. The spider's web is in 29:41.
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 'Indeed with hardship will be...' — complete this from Surah Ash-Sharh.
cards.answer: ...ease (yusra) — 94:5. Repeated twice! One hardship, two eases.
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 'O believers, fasting has been decreed upon you as it was decreed upon...' — complete.
cards.answer: ...those before you, that you may become righteous — Al-Baqarah 2:183
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: I begin with 'Tabarak' and am said to protect from the punishment of the grave. I have 30 verses.
cards.answer: Surah Al-Mulk — Surah 67
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 'Allah does not burden a soul beyond that it can bear' — name the Surah and verse number.
cards.answer: Al-Baqarah 2:286 — last verse of the Surah
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Name the verse listing 8 categories of Zakat recipients. Which Surah and verse?
cards.answer: At-Tawbah 9:60 — poor, needy, administrators, reconciled hearts, freeing slaves, debtors, Allah's cause, stranded traveler.
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 'The best of you are those who learn the Quran and...' Complete.
cards.answer: ...teach it. (Bukhari 5027)
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: In which cave did the Prophet (pbuh) receive the first revelation? What were the first words?
cards.answer: Cave Hira. 'Iqra!' (Read/Recite) — Surah Al-Alaq 96:1. Age 40.
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 'Religion is ___.' Fill in the ONE word.
cards.answer: Naseeha (Sincere Advice). (Muslim 55)
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: What is the Hadith of Jibril? What three levels of religion does it describe?
cards.answer: Islam, Iman (Faith), Ihsan (Excellence). (Muslim 8)
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Battle of Badr (2 AH) — What was remarkable about the outcome?
cards.answer: 313 Muslims defeated ~1,000 Quraysh (3:1 odds). Angels sent to assist.
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Name the six rights of a Muslim upon a Muslim.
cards.answer: 1) Return salaam 2) Accept invitations 3) Give advice 4) Yarhamukallah at sneeze 5) Visit sick 6) Follow funeral. (Muslim 2162)
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Name the five Ulul 'Azm (Messengers of greatest resolve).
cards.answer: Muhammad, Ibrahim, Musa, Isa, Nuh. (Quran 46:35, 33:7)
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Name the miracle of Musa AS, Isa AS, and Muhammad (pbuh).
cards.answer: Musa: parting Red Sea. Isa: raising the dead. Muhammad: the Quran itself.
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: What month is Ramadan? Why is it significant?
cards.answer: 9th Islamic month. Quran revealed (2:185). Fasting obligatory. Month of Laylat al-Qadr.
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Who was the FIRST person ever to accept Islam?
cards.answer: Khadijah bint Khuwaylid — the Prophet's first wife.
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Who was Sumayyah bint Khayyat and why is she significant?
cards.answer: First martyr (shaheedah) in Islam. Killed by Abu Jahl for refusing to renounce faith.
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: What is Wudu? Name the four fardh acts.
cards.answer: 1) Wash face 2) Arms to elbows 3) Wipe head 4) Feet to ankles. (Quran 5:6)
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Who was Bilal ibn Rabah and why is he significant?
cards.answer: Former Abyssinian slave. First Muaddhin. Freed by Abu Bakr. Symbol of equality.
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Name four conditions for Salah to be valid.
cards.answer: 1) Wudu 2) Clean body/clothes/place 3) Cover awra 4) Face qibla 5) Prayer time 6) Niyya
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: What is Tayammum? When permitted and how performed?
cards.answer: Dry ablution with clean earth. When water unavailable. Strike earth, wipe face, wipe hands. (Quran 4:43)
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Who was Salman al-Farsi? What strategy did he suggest at the Battle of the Trench?
cards.answer: Persian companion. Suggested digging a trench around Madinah (5 AH). Saved city from 10,000 soldiers.
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 'In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious...' — complete this.
cards.answer: ...the Most Merciful (Ar-Raheem) — Al-Fatiha 1:1
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 'Indeed we belong to Allah and...' — the phrase said upon difficulty or loss.
cards.answer: ...to Him we shall return — Al-Baqarah 2:156
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 'So verily, with the hardship, there is...' — what comes after?
cards.answer: ...relief / ease (yusra) — Ash-Sharh 94:5
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: I am named after an insect that warned its colony from Sulayman's army. I mention the Queen of Sheba.
cards.answer: Surah An-Naml / The Ant — Surah 27
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 'And I did not create jinn and humans except...' — complete from Adh-Dhariyat.
cards.answer: ...except to worship Me — 51:56
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 'And We have certainly made the Quran easy for...' — complete from Al-Qamar.
cards.answer: ...remembrance. So is there any who will remember? — 54:17
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: I contain Ayat al-Kursi, the verse on no compulsion in religion, and the longest verse in the Quran. Name me.
cards.answer: Surah Al-Baqarah — 2:255, 2:256, 2:282
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 'Whoever puts their trust in Allah, He will be enough for them.' Name the verse and the concept.
cards.answer: At-Talaq 65:3. The concept is Tawakkul (reliance on Allah).
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 'Actions are judged by their intentions, and every person will get reward according to what they have...' Complete.
cards.answer: ...intended. (Bukhari 1, Muslim 1907)
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 'Smiling in the face of your brother is...' Complete.
cards.answer: ...charity (sadaqah). (At-Tirmidhi 1956)
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: What is the Hijra and when did it occur? What does it mark?
cards.answer: Migration from Makkah to Madinah — 622 CE. Start of Hijri calendar.
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Name the Sahabi who narrated the most hadiths — over 5000.
cards.answer: Abu Hurairah — ~5,374 hadiths.
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 'Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day, let him speak good or...' Complete.
cards.answer: ...remain silent. (Bukhari 6018, Muslim 47)
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: What was the Treaty of Hudaybiyyah? Why did the Prophet (pbuh) call it a victory?
cards.answer: Peace treaty (6 AH). Quran called it 'a clear victory' (48:1). Islam spread massively after.
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: What are the 'Nawaqid al-Islam' (nullifiers)? Name at least four.
cards.answer: Major shirk, mocking religion, believing another's guidance surpasses the Prophet's, supporting polytheists against Muslims, hating any part of the message.
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 23 years of prophethood — how was it divided between Makkah and Madinah?
cards.answer: 13 years Makkah (610-622 CE), 10 years Madinah (622-632 CE). Born ~570 CE, died age 63.
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: What is the Year of Sorrow ('Aam al-Huzn)? What two losses occurred?
cards.answer: ~619 CE. Lost Khadijah (wife) and Abu Talib (uncle/protector) within weeks.
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: What is Hajj? When is it performed and who must do it?
cards.answer: Pilgrimage to Makkah in Dhul Hijjah. Obligatory once for every able Muslim.
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Who was the first free adult man to accept Islam? What title was he given?
cards.answer: Abu Bakr As-Siddiq — 'The Truthful One.' First Caliph.
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Recite the Shahadah and explain what it means.
cards.answer: 'Ash-hadu an la ilaha illa Allah, wa ash-hadu anna Muhammadan rasulullah.' — No deity except Allah, Muhammad is His messenger.
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: What is Tahajjud prayer? When is the best time?
cards.answer: Voluntary night prayer after Isha before Fajr. Best: last third of the night. (Bukhari 1145)
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Who was Aisha bint Abi Bakr? Name three facts.
cards.answer: 1) Wife of Prophet, Mother of Believers 2) ~2,210 hadiths 3) Greatest female scholar.
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Name the four Sunni madhahib and their founders.
cards.answer: 1) Hanafi — Abu Hanifa 2) Maliki — Malik ibn Anas 3) Shafi'i — Ash-Shafi'i 4) Hanbali — Ahmad ibn Hanbal
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Name the four sacred months when fighting was forbidden.
cards.answer: Dhul Qa'dah (11th), Dhul Hijjah (12th), Muharram (1st), Rajab (7th). (Quran 9:36)
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Who was Mus'ab ibn Umayr? Why is he the 'first ambassador of Islam'?
cards.answer: Wealthy Qurayshi who gave up luxury. Sent to Madinah before Hijra to teach. Martyred at Uhud.
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: I describe the Night of Power (Laylat al-Qadr) — better than 1,000 months. I have only 5 verses.
cards.answer: Surah Al-Qadr — Surah 97
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: I am the shortest Surah with only 3 verses. I mention a river in Paradise.
cards.answer: Surah Al-Kawthar — Surah 108
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 'He is Allah, the One...' — which Surah begins with this and what does it teach?
cards.answer: Surah Al-Ikhlas (112:1). Teaches Tawhid. Worth 1/3 of the Quran.
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: I am named after a cave where young believers hid for centuries. I also contain the story of Dhul-Qarnayn.
cards.answer: Surah Al-Kahf — Surah 18. Recommended every Friday.
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 'O mankind, indeed We have created you from male and female and made you peoples and tribes that you may...' — complete from Al-Hujurat.
cards.answer: ...know one another. Indeed, the most noble of you in the sight of Allah is the most righteous — Al-Hujurat 49:13
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: I contain the full story of Prophet Yusuf AS — dream, well, Egypt, prison, reunion. I am 'the best of stories'.
cards.answer: Surah Yusuf — Surah 12. 'Ahsan al-qasas' in 12:3.
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: I am named after iron. I state iron was 'sent down' — which modern science confirms came from supernovae.
cards.answer: Surah Al-Hadid / Iron — 57:25
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Which verse is the 'Verse of Light'? Describe what it compares Allah's light to.
cards.answer: An-Nur 24:35. A niche with a lamp, lamp in glass, glass like a star, lit from olive tree.
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 'Cleanliness is ___ of faith.' Complete this hadith.
cards.answer: Half. (Muslim 223)
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: What is the greeting of Islam? What does it mean?
cards.answer: As-salamu alaykum — 'Peace be upon you.' (Muslim 54)
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Which Prophet AS was swallowed by a whale? What du'a did he make inside it?
cards.answer: Prophet Yunus AS. 'La ilaha illa anta subhanaka inni kuntu minaz-zalimin' (21:87)
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 'The best of you are those who are best to their ___.' Fill in the blank.
cards.answer: Families (wives). (At-Tirmidhi 3895)
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: What title was Prophet Ibrahim AS given? What does it mean?
cards.answer: Khalilullah — 'Friend of Allah.' (Quran 4:125)
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Name the Prophet (pbuh)'s first wife, first daughter, and burial city.
cards.answer: Wife: Khadijah. Daughter: Zainab. Buried in Madinah (Masjid an-Nabawi).
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Name the six authentic hadith collections (Al-Kutub as-Sittah) and their compilers.
cards.answer: 1) Bukhari 2) Muslim 3) Abu Dawud 4) At-Tirmidhi 5) An-Nasa'i 6) Ibn Majah
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: What happened at Uhud (3 AH)? What key lesson did the Muslims learn?
cards.answer: Archers left posts, Quraysh counter-attacked. 70 martyred including Hamza. Lesson: obey the Prophet's commands. (Quran 3:152)
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Name all FIVE Pillars of Islam in order.
cards.answer: 1) Shahadah 2) Salah 3) Zakat 4) Sawm 5) Hajj. (Bukhari 8)
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: What do Muslims say when they hear the Prophet (pbuh)'s name?
cards.answer: Sallallahu alayhi wa sallam — 'May Allah's peace and blessings be upon him.' (Quran 33:56)
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Which Sahabi was called 'Dhul Nurayn' (possessor of two lights) and why?
cards.answer: Uthman ibn Affan — married two daughters of the Prophet. 3rd Caliph.
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Name the SIX Articles of Faith (Arkan al-Iman).
cards.answer: 1) Allah 2) Angels 3) Books 4) Messengers 5) Last Day 6) Divine Decree (Qadar). (Muslim 8)
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: What is I'tikaf and when is it commonly practiced?
cards.answer: Spiritual retreat in the mosque, last 10 nights of Ramadan. Seeking Laylat al-Qadr.
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Which Sahabi was 'Saifullah' (Sword of Allah)? Why?
cards.answer: Khalid ibn al-Walid — undefeated commander. Title given after Battle of Mu'tah (8 AH).
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: What is the difference between Sadaqah and Zakat?
cards.answer: Zakat: obligatory 2.5%, specific recipients (9:60). Sadaqah: voluntary, no fixed amount, includes kind acts.
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Name the Ten Companions promised Paradise.
cards.answer: Abu Bakr, Umar, Uthman, Ali, Talha, Zubair, Abdurrahman ibn Awf, Sa'd ibn Abi Waqqas, Sa'id ibn Zayd, Abu Ubayda.
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Who was Fatimah? Name three facts about her significance.
cards.answer: 1) Daughter of Prophet and Khadijah 2) Wife of Ali, mother of Hasan and Husayn 3) 'Leader of Women of Paradise.' (Bukhari 3624)
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: I am the last two Surahs of the Quran, recited together for protection. What are we collectively called?
cards.answer: Al-Mu'awwidhatain — Al-Falaq (113) + An-Nas (114)
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: I am recited every Friday. My name refers to the Day of Gathering (Friday prayer).
cards.answer: Surah Al-Jumu'ah — Surah 62
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: I am the longest Surah with 286 ayahs. My name refers to a cow the Israelites sacrificed.
cards.answer: Surah Al-Baqarah — Surah 2
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: I am named after a she-camel — a miraculous sign given to Prophet Salih AS for the people of Thamud.
cards.answer: The she-camel story is in Surah Hud (11:61-68) and Ash-Shams (91:13)
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 'Indeed, Allah will not change the condition of a people until they change what is within...' — name the Surah.
cards.answer: ...themselves — Surah Ar-Ra'd (The Thunder) 13:11
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: I begin with Ya-Sin. I am often described as 'the heart of the Quran' and recited for the dying.
cards.answer: Surah Ya-Sin — Surah 36
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ ... — Finish Āyat al-Kursī.
cards.answer: Āyat al-Kursī — Al-Baqarah 2:255 — The greatest verse in the Quran. Recite after every obligatory prayer for protection.
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: I am called 'The Event.' I open with: 'When the Occurrence occurs...' I vividly describe three groups on the Day of Judgment. Name me and the three groups.
cards.answer: Surah Al-Waqi'ah — Surah 56. 1) As-Sabiqun (the foremost) 2) Ashab al-Yameen (people of the right) 3) Ashab ash-Shimal (people of the left).
cards.formula: Ayah + Meaning + Location -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 'None of you truly believes until he loves for his brother what he loves for...' Complete.
cards.answer: ...himself. (Bukhari 13, Muslim 45)
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: What was the full name of Prophet Muhammad (pbuh)? What does 'Muhammad' mean?
cards.answer: Muhammad ibn Abdullah. 'The Praised One.' Also called Ahmad.
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: What was the Prophet (pbuh)'s profession before prophethood? What was he known as?
cards.answer: Merchant/trader. 'As-Sadiq Al-Ameen' (The Truthful, The Trustworthy).
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Name the two hadith collections called 'The Two Sahihs.'
cards.answer: Sahih Al-Bukhari and Sahih Muslim (Al-Sahihayn).
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Describe Isra wal Mi'raj. What was its most significant outcome?
cards.answer: Night journey to Al-Aqsa + ascent through heavens. 5 daily prayers made obligatory.
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 'The most beloved deeds to Allah are...' — what follows?
cards.answer: ...the most consistent, even if they are small. (Bukhari 6465)
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: 'I have been given five things not given to anyone before me...' Name at least three.
cards.answer: 1) Victory through awe 2) Earth made a place of prayer 3) War booty lawful 4) Intercession 5) Sent to all mankind. (Bukhari 335)
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: What was the Farewell Sermon? Name three key messages.
cards.answer: Arafah, final Hajj (10 AH). All people equal by taqwa, riba abolished, treat women well, hold to Quran and Sunnah.
cards.formula: Hadith + Source + Practice -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Name the five daily prayers in order.
cards.answer: Fajr · Dhuhr · Asr · Maghrib · Isha
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: What is the Adhan? Who calls it and what does 'Allahu Akbar' mean?
cards.answer: Call to prayer. Called by Muaddhin. 'Allahu Akbar' = 'Allah is the Greatest.'
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Who was the first child to accept Islam?
cards.answer: Ali ibn Abi Talib — the Prophet's cousin, later 4th Caliph. About 10 years old.
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: What is Zakat? Who must pay it and at what rate?
cards.answer: Obligatory almsgiving. 2.5% of savings above nisab (~85g gold) held for one lunar year.
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Name the Four Rightly-Guided Caliphs in order.
cards.answer: 1) Abu Bakr 2) Umar ibn al-Khattab 3) Uthman ibn Affan 4) Ali ibn Abi Talib
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Who was Umar ibn al-Khattab? Name two things he is famous for.
cards.answer: 2nd Caliph. 1) Justice — walked streets at night 2) Expanded state to Jerusalem, Persia, Egypt.
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Name the rites of Hajj in order (at least 5 key steps).
cards.answer: 1) Ihram 2) Tawaf 3) Sa'i 4) Arafah 5) Muzdalifah 6) Jamarat 7) Sacrifice 8) Tawaf al-Ifadah 9) Farewell Tawaf
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned

cards.question: Who compiled the first Quran? Who standardised it?
cards.answer: Zaid ibn Thabit under Abu Bakr. Standardised by Uthman ibn Affan. After Battle of Yamama.
cards.formula: History/Seerah + Context + Impact -> Allah Name -> Theme Learned
